## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test` pass
- [ ] New/changed behavior has a test (mock-based — see `test/helpers.ts`)
- [ ] Public API changes documented in `docs/api-reference.md` (and `README.md` if user-facing)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
